level.title: Train Your Minion
level.subdescription: Your Minion can talk. Your Minion has a base. But right now they pitch like every other Minion - generic, inconsistent, forgettable. Time to give them a superpower. Train your Minion with a Skill and watch the same prompt produce something completely different.

mission_check: Ran the pitch prompt without any Skill loaded
Uploaded the Skill file to Claude
Ran the exact same prompt again with the Skill active
I can clearly see the difference between both outputs

reveal.insight: Same prompt. Completely different experience. That is what a Skill does.
reveal.reuse: And this same Skill works for any presentation - a product launch, a strategy review, a team update. You built it once. You use it everywhere.

mission_targets: See the difference between a Minion without training and one with a Skill
Upload a Skill that turns your Minion into a pitch specialist
Run the same prompt twice and see the transformation

mission_gear.name: Skills
mission_gear.definition: A reusable instruction file that trains Claude to handle a specific type of task in a specific way - every single time, automatically.
mission_gear.theme_translation: Think of it as sending your Minion to specialist school. Before - they wing it. After - they follow a proven method every time. Same Minion. Completely different output.
why_useful: Works across any Project - not just this one
Same quality output every single time - no inconsistency
You build it once and reuse it forever
Claude asks the right questions before diving in
